articles.title: MS Dhoni tops taxpayer list as Jharkhand-Bihar see Rs 20,000 crore tax collection
articles.description: Former India captain MS Dhoni has been revealed as the highest individual taxpayer from Jharkhand and Bihar combined for the 2025-26 financial year. The Principal Chief Commissioner of Income Tax confirmed Dhoni's top position, though the exact tax amount remains undisclosed. This achievement highlights Dhoni's significant financial contribution to the region.

articles.title: IOC lifts Olympics ban on Belarus but Russia 'still suspended'
articles.description: The IOC on Thursday lifted its ban on Belarusian athletes competing in the Olympics, although restrictions on Russian athletes remain in place. Competitors from Russia and their allies Belarus had been banned from international competition following Russia’s 2022 invasion of Ukraine, although some were permitted to compete as neutrals. READ: Olympics cannot exclude and divide says IOC amid Russian athletes row Russians will still only be able to compete in Olympic competition under the neutral banner, on an individual basis, and only if they have not actively supported the conflict. The IOC executive board released a statement saying that it [...]... Keep on reading: IOC lifts Olympics ban on Belarus but Russia 'still suspended'

articles.title: On the air - Thu, 07 May 2026 PST
Pay Bunny her money! Man City making a huge mistake letting Khadija Shaw leave as Chelsea close in on WSL's top scorer
articles.description: Over the last few weeks, as Manchester City have been chasing down their first Women's Super League title in 10 years, things have become nervy on and off the pitch. Dropped points had threatened to let Arsenal back in the title race, until the Gunners' own midweek slip-up at Brighton ended that suspense. Still, though any concerns around the destiny of the WSL trophy have now been put to bed, City fans can still worry themselves over the future of their star striker, Khadija Shaw.

articles.description: Alexis Mac Allister and Enzo Fernandez have a lot in common. They also presently play for big Premier League teams, but both have been repeatedly linked with Real Madrid. Up until last summer, such speculation made an awful lot of sense.

articles.title: 📋 São Paulo named for new Copa Sul-Americana test
articles.description: It’s a Copa Sudamericana night for São Paulo. Tricolor visit Chilean side O'Higgins at Estadio El Teniente in Rancagua. Kickoff is set for 7 p.m. (Brasília time). And it is valid for the fourth round of Group C in the competition. Yael Falcón (ARG) is the referee. ESPN and Disney+ will broadcast the match. 🇨🇱 O'Higgins São Paulo’s rival is enjoying a good spell. They won their last Sudamericana match, their last two fixtures in the Chilean league, and lead their group in the Copa Chile after drawing in the last round. This Thursday’s clash is crucial, as they have six points and will then play two away matches. Millonarios (four points) and Boston River (zero) will also play at the same time. Lucas Bovaglio rested some starters in the cup match precisely to have his strongest lineup available. 🇾🇪 São Paulo Tricolor lead the group with seven points and could move very close to securing first place - which guarantees direct qualification to the round of 16. Roger Machado has a total of seven players out injured - including Lucas Moura, who is out for the season. Marcos Antônio, Lucas Ramon, Pablo Maia, Alan Franco, Tolói, and Maik are the other names in the medical department. Only Bobadilla was rested and did not even travel. But the lineup does in fact feature several backups and academy products from Cotia. The idea is to use the main available players if needed. Photo: Reprodução/São Paulo This article was translated into English by Artificial Intelligence. You can read the original version in 🇧🇷 here.
